name: Best Coffee Cake!!!!
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 C).
2. Grease a tube pan with Wesson oil.
3. In a large bowl, combine the yellow cake mix, eggs, apricot nectar, and lemon extract. Mix until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared tube pan.
5. Bake for approximately 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Remove from oven and let cool slightly.
7. For the icing, juice 3 lemons and mix with powdered sugar to desired consistency.
8. Once the cake is warm, punch holes in it using a skewer or chopstick.
9. Pour the icing over the top of the cake.
10. Sprinkle additional powdered sugar on top before serving.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
